concepts.title: Theta series from lattices
concepts.blurb: Theta series encode lattice counts and often produce modular forms.

concepts.title: q-expansion and convergence
concepts.blurb: The series converges absolutely on the upper half-plane; the q-expansion displays theta as a Laurent-in-q^{1/2} generating function.

concepts.title: Theta transformation law
concepts.blurb: Poisson summation drives modular transformation formulas for theta functions.

concepts.title: Dedekind eta and theta
concepts.blurb: The Dedekind eta function η(τ) is a weight-1/2 companion to theta; η^24=Δ sits inside the theta world.

concepts.title: Jacobi triple product and q-identities
concepts.blurb: Product-sum identities connect partitions, q-series, and modular phenomena.
